text: My work would most likely make my life hell at work to push me to leave for even asking for these things to help in the first place. It's really not that simple
I am suffering with it and my manager has issues with me😢😢

Thankfully my employers are AMAZING but employers can only be amazing for so long not for long term despite knowledge or understanding. This is what it is and unfortunately in my line of work I cannot WFH
What if you are working as a domicile’s carer?
How about healthcare assistance I’m doome
Shame the majority of employers don’t support people.
